svg.title: WebMS emblem
svg.desc: Abstract connection / structure / data mark: a central hub module linked to three outer nodes. Layers: each part is a named group with its own title/desc. HOW TO RECOLOUR: every colour is a named token in (brand, ink, grey, etc.) referenced by fill="url(#token)". Edit a token's stop-color(s) once to recolour everywhere it is used.

linearGradient.desc: BRAND token — primary indigo gradient. Edit these two stop-colors to recolour the brand (emblem + "MS") everywhere it is referenced via fill="url(#brand)".

g.title: Connections
g.desc: Three rounded links binding the hub to each node.

g.title: Nodes
g.desc: Three outer endpoints (pages / clients in the system).

g.title: Hub
g.desc: Central module the structure is built around.
